biography: Yves Pelletier (born January 15, 1961) is a Canadian film director, actor and comedian. He is best known for being a part of the comedy troupe "Rock et Belles Oreilles" (R.B.O.) from their debut in 1981 up to the group's separation in 1995. He made his debut as a film director in 2004 with Love and Magnets and his second movie, Le Baiser du Barbu was released on June 2010.
name: Yves Pelletier
